headline: United Airlines Chef Partnership Puts Premium Cabins And Valuation In Focus
summary: United Airlines Holdings (NasdaqGS:UAL) has launched an inflight dining collaboration with Chef's Table. The partnership introduces exclusive chef curated menus for international business class passengers. United is also adding branded Chef's Table inflight entertainment content as part of the rollout. United Airlines Holdings operates a global route network, with international business class sitting at the high end of its product range. As large carriers compete on comfort, service, and on...
